name: Wendys Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in oil until fully cooked.
2. Break the meat into small rice-sized pieces.
3. Place half of the cooked beef and one can of onion soup in a blender.
4. Blend on high speed until it resembles cement mortar.
5. Transfer the blended mixture to a 2-1/2 quart saucepan with the remaining unblended beef.
6. Add the rest of the ingredients to the saucepan.
7. Simmer gently until all flavors are well combined and the chili is heated through.
